description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow set on a rectangular green plot with a detached swimming pool. The structure features clean, geometric lines and a predominantly white facade, with large windows and multiple terraces or balconies on both the front and rear sides. The main entrance is centrally located, flanked by wide steps and bordered by railings, while the rear of the building opens onto a spacious patio area. The bungalow is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a multi-level appearance with varying roof heights. The windows are arranged in both single and grouped patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The surrounding lawn and pool area suggest a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, white, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, multiple terraces, and a detached swimming pool on a green plot. The structure features clean lines and a multi-level, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide steps, central terrace, and the detached swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the building's layered volumes, side windows, and the pool positioned to the left of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large patio area, rear terraces, and grouped windows, with the pool visible in the background.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the building's stepped roofline, side terraces, and the pool to the right of the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single windows on all sides
